problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
